title: For a Weary Parent
body:
Lord, the children are loud,
and the work is unfinished,
and I am tired.
Thank You that I am loved, even when I am not at my best.
Thank You for the long patience of parenthood,
which is, perhaps, a small image of Yours.
Help me to rest soon.
Help me to not feel guilty when I do.
Amen.
